# gazebo-mcp

A general-purpose Gazebo simulation server via MCP (14 tools).

## Tools
- sim_status — health check
- load_world / list_worlds — world depot management
- spawn_model — spawn models into running sim
- start_sim / stop_sim / list_jobs — simulation lifecycle
- get_state / apply_control — sim state and topic control
- agentic_sim_workflow — multi-step AI orchestration
- natural_language_control — NL to topic commands
- analyze_sim_state / analyze_sim_logs — AI analysis
- discover_model — AI-powered model discovery

All tools annotated with READ_ONLY / MUTATING for agent safety.

## Setup
```powershell
uv run python -m gazebo_mcp
.\start.ps1    # web dashboard (10990/10991)
```

## Docs
- docs/GAZEBO_VS_OTHERS.md — Gazebo vs MuJoCo/Isaac/PyBullet
- llms-full.txt — full tool reference, env vars, troubleshooting

## Ports
- Backend: 10991 (FastAPI + MCP HTTP)
- Frontend: 10990 (Vite dev)
